title: Why Ares Management Is A Compelling Income Growth Stock
text: Ares Management has seen strong growth in recent years, and this is expected to continue. It's well-positioned to capitalize on the growing global wealth management and infrastructure markets.

title: Ryan To Receive New Investment From Ares Management and Continued Investment From Onex Partners
text: DALLAS and TORONTO, May 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ryan, LLC (“Ryan” or the “Company”) and Onex Corporation (“Onex”) (TSX: ONEX) announced today a private equity fund managed by Ares Management Corporation (“Ares”) (NYSE: ARES) has committed to acquiring a significant minority equity interest in Ryan, valuing the Company at $2.5 billion. The investment was made in partnership with Ryan's management team and the Company's existing investor Onex Partners, Onex' flagship private equity platform, who will retain a significant minority equity interest in Ryan. This combined partnership will drive the next stage of growth for the Company.

title: Ares Management Corporation to Present at the Bernstein 38th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ares Management Corporation announced today that its Chief Executive Officer and President, Michael Arougheti, is scheduled to present at the Bernstein 38th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, June 2, 2022 at 2:30pm ET. A live audio webcast of the presentation will be available in the Investor Resources section of the Company's website at www.aresmgmt.com.
